decision_point: In an adult with uncomplicated greater trochanteric pain syndrome, is structured physical rehabilitation or surgical bursectomy preferred?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with uncomplicated greater trochanteric pain syndrome, is structured physical rehabilitation or surgical bursectomy preferred?
Options:
  1. Structured physical rehabilitation
  2. Surgical bursectomy
label: settled
label_rationale: Physical therapy targeting hip abductor strength and tissue conditioning is standard; surgical bursectomy offers no additional value in primary cases.
